title: Looker Studio Asset
description: Represents a Looker Studio asset such as a report or data source. Assets are the primary objects managed through the Looker Studio API.

name.description: The resource name of the asset, serving as its unique identifier.

assetType.description: The type of Looker Studio asset.

title.description: The display title of the asset as shown in the Looker Studio interface.

description.description: A text description of the asset. Available for reports only.

owner.description: The email address of the asset owner who has full control over the asset.

creator.description: The email address of the user who originally created the asset.

createTime.description: The timestamp when the asset was created, in RFC 3339 format.

updateTime.description: The timestamp when the asset was last modified by any user, in RFC 3339 format.

updateByMeTime.description: The timestamp when the authenticated user last modified the asset.

lastViewByMeTime.description: The timestamp when the authenticated user last viewed the asset.

trashed.description: Whether the asset has been moved to the trash.
